About Us
INDO-MIM Limited
is a globally recognized manufacturer of Precision Engineering Components using Metal Injection Molding (“
MIM”)
technology.
Founded in 1996 and headquartered in Bengaluru, India, the company has changed component production for industries such as Automotive, Aerospace, Medical, Defence and Consumer products.
Strategic acquisitions such as Conway Marsh Garrett Technologies Limited
CMG Technologies
(UK)
Triax Industries
, LLC
(USA),
and
Phoenix DeVentures II Inc.
have added to INDO-MIM’s capabilities in MIM and advanced machining, strengthening its global footprint.
The company adheres to stringent quality standards, holding certifications like
NADCAP, ISO 9001:2015, IATF 16949:2016, ISO 13485:2016,
AS 9100:2016, ISO 27001:2022, ISO 14001:2015, and ISO 45001:2018
. These accreditations reflect its commitment to quality, environmental sustainability, and information security.

Metal Injection Molding
INDO-MIM is a fully integrated
Metal Injection Molding (MIM)
parts manufacturer with capabilities in design, tooling, materials, and a full range of finishing and assembly operations. INDO-MIM has the world’s largest installed capacity for MIM, located in India & the United States. Metal Injection Molding is a cost-effective solution for components with complex profile and with high volume

What is Metal Injection Molding?
Metal Injection Molding is a niche process in which fine metal powder is mixed with binder to create a feedstock which is used to get solidified complex-shaped metal components.
MIM Process
1. Compounding
Feedstock preparation process from fine metal powder
2. Injection Molding
Feedstock is fed into an injection molding machine
3. Debinding
Binder materials are removed from the molded component
4. Sintering
The brown parts are slowly heated in a protective atmosphere
Technologies We Serve
Metal Injection Molding:
INDO-MIM supplies precision components globally. We are committed to catering to the needs of our customer from start to finish. Our facilities are in India, The USA & Europe.
Learn More
Investment Casting:
INDO-MIM’s, Investment Casting facilities are in India and US, offers a range of a wide metal manufacturing services like Vacuum Casting, and Precision Machining
